name: Savory Corncakes
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Canned creamed corn (or leftover homemade)
1 large Ear of corn, kernels cut off (approximately 2/3 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the dry ingredients.
2. Beat together the creamed corn, egg, milk, and oil, and stir into the dry mixture. Do not overmix.
3. Let the batter rest, refrigerated, for an hour or more before proceeding.
4. Stir in the corn kernels and minced onion.
5. Cook the batter in batches, dropping by tablespoonfuls onto a greased griddle over medium heat. Cook 2 minutes per side, or until golden.
6. Keep warm in a 200°F oven while finishing.
Makes 24 small corncakes.
Per corncake: 42 calories, 1 gram protein, 7 grams carbohydrates, 0.5 gram fiber, 1 gram fat (trace saturated), 43 milligrams sodium.
